title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Toppr - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Toppr - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Toppr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Toppr:
Toppr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr!
